description: 4 - 19-12-2024 - Emails between Vincent Devine (Government Chief Security Officer, CO) and others

On Thu, 19 Dec 2024 at 13:56, Michael Roberts Personal > wrote:

Hi Vincent,
T have just sent on the latest email from Gerard.

We haven't heard anything more from Gerard on who the individual will be since last night
but we stand ready to support. The strong indication last night was that the individual would
be from the HoL and so therefore no NSV required. Vita has been in touch with Gerard on

the STRAP point so I think, for now, we're covered.
Michael
On Thu, 19 Dec 2024 at 13:18, Vincent Devine 
wrote:
Any news on this?  It would be good to be reassured that they are moving the wheels.  
Gerard will have to confirm the position on DV with his PermSec and possibly SofS (who 
will both I assume be happy to hear the news) and get the STRAP guys moving before the 
Christmas break. 
V
Vincent Devine
Director General & Government Chief Security Officer
Government Security Function
Cabinet Office

FCDO STRAPSO and the STRAP authorities. 
V
Vincent Devine

 has probably explained, email below relates to Gerard's note last night... Vita has

Michael

8


You asked earlier today whether an individual from the House of Lords needs to go
through vetting.

From a recap of the paper at GSB in October, such an individual would be exempt. Tom
and Vita will be best placed to answer further policy questions (and I must confess to
never knowing how STRAP works at the best of times, never mind in this scenario!).

best,
Michael

Michael Roberts

Assurance Deputy Director

UKSV, Government Security Group
Cabinet Office
Ee Personal

Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.

Hi Vincent,
T have just sent on the latest email from Gerard.

We haven't heard anything more from Gerard on who the individual will be since last night
but we stand ready to support. The strong indication last night was that the individual would
be from the HoL and so therefore no NSV required. Vita has been in touch with Gerard on

the STRAP point so I think, for now, we're covered.
Michael

On Thu, 19 Dec 2024 at 13:18, Vincent Devine 
Any news on this?  It would be good to be reassured that they are moving the wheels.  
Gerard will have to confirm the position on DV with his PermSec and possibly SofS (who 
will both I assume be happy to hear the news) and get the STRAP guys moving before the 
Christmas break. 
V
Vincent Devine
Director General & Government Chief Security Officer
